task_description: Wave 4 - E2E Testing (admin + critical flows), Real Search Engine (Meilisearch with factory pattern and fallback), Observability (OpenTelemetry SDK with OTLP exporters, Jaeger/Prometheus/Grafana), Load Testing (k6 smoke/load/stress with SLOs), and Admin Observability Page

verification.summary: All 134 typecheck, 135 test, 108 build, 112 lint tasks pass. New tests for search engines (10 tests) and observability SDK (6 tests) validate core logic.
